scripts.dev: cross-env NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 MOCKIFYER_PATH=../../mock-data MOCKIFYER_CLIENT_ID=multi-service-demo next dev --turbopack -p 3040
scripts.dev:record: cross-env NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 MOCKIFYER_RECORD=true MOCKIFYER_PATH=../../mock-data MOCKIFYER_CLIENT_ID=multi-service-demo next dev --turbopack -p 3040
scripts.dev:webpack: cross-env NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 MOCKIFYER_PATH=../../mock-data MOCKIFYER_CLIENT_ID=multi-service-demo next dev -p 3040
